excludedItems.name: chat
excludedItems.reason: Module-owned view; @workspace/chat is not yet represented as an installable Sigil registry module.

excludedItems.name: entity-browser
excludedItems.reason: Module-owned view; @workspace/data is not yet represented as an installable Sigil registry module.

items.name: themes
items.title: Sigil theme envelopes
items.description: The seven thermal-envelope theme classes (amber, copper, midnight, rose-gold, jade, bone, ultraviolet). Overrides the token slots defined by your base styles; apply a theme class on <html> alongside "dark". The file intentionally lives app-side in this repo (UI package defines token SLOTS, the app fills them) — the registry inlines its content at build time.

items.name: skill-component-development
items.title: Skill: component development
items.description: Agent skill (Claude Code .claude/skills format) covering the authoring standard these components follow: compound Root/Parts + CVA, base-ui render-prop conventions, useEffect/useMemo restrictions, and the verification bar. Install alongside the components so your agent composes with them correctly. Some examples reference monorepo paths; adjust to your project's aliases.

items.name: skill-ux-design-language
items.title: Skill: UX design language
items.description: Agent skill (Claude Code .claude/skills format): the semantic-visual-encoding check behind this design system — every color, shadow, badge, gradient, and motion must justify itself; badges display values that can change. Install so your agent keeps new screens inside the language.
